/* Section */
.himex-content {
    color: #fff;
}

.himex-badge {
    display: inline-block;
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.25);
    border-radius: 40px;
    padding: 10px 24px;
    margin-bottom: 30px;
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
}

.himex-badge-label {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 6px;
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: #111;
    background: #f3f4f6;
    padding: 5px 10px;
    border-radius: 999px;
    line-height: 1;
}

.himex-badge-icon {
    width: 14px;
    height: 14px;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    color: #111; /* controls SVG stroke */
}

.himex-content h3 {
    font-size:36px;
  font-weight:700;
  text-transform:uppercase;
    line-height:48px;
    margin-bottom: 30px;
    color: #fff;
}

.himex-content p {
    font-size: 16px;
    line-height: 1.6;
    margin-bottom:30px;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,.9);
}

.himex-list {
    list-style: none;
    padding: 0;
}

.himex-list li {
    position: relative;
    padding-left: 30px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    font-size: 15px;
    color: #fff;
}

.himex-list li:before {
    content: "";
    width: 10px;
    height: 10px;
    background: #2ecc71;
    border-radius: 50%;
    position: absolute;
    left: 0;
    top: 12px;
}

/* Form Card */

.himex-form-card{
    background:#f4f4f4;
    padding:50px;
    border-radius:16px;
    box-shadow:0 15px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.12);
}

.himex-form-card h3{
    text-align:center;
    font-size:36px;
  font-weight:700;
  text-transform:uppercase;
  line-height:48px;
    margin-bottom:25px;
    color:#0d2d5c;
}

.himex-form-card .subtitle{
    text-align:center;
    color:#7b8794;
    margin-bottom:35px;
}

.himex-form-card label{
    display:block;
    margin-bottom:10px;
    font-weight:600;
    color:#5b6470;
}

.himex-form-card input[type=email]{
    width:100%;
    height:64px;
    border:1px solid #d7dde5;
    border-radius:8px;
    padding:0 20px;
    margin-bottom:20px;
}

.checkbox-row{
    display:flex;
    align-items:flex-start;
    gap:10px;
    margin-bottom:25px;
}

.checkbox-row input{
    margin-top: 8px;
}

.himex-form-card input[type=submit]{
    width:100%;
    height:64px;
    border:none;
    border-radius:8px;

    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
}

.himex-badge-label {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 6px;
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: #111;
    background: #f3f4f6;
    padding: 5px 10px;
    border-radius: 999px;
    line-height: 1;
}

.himex-badge-icon {

    height: 14px;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    color: #111; /* controls SVG stroke */
}

.himex-content h3 {
    font-size:36px;
        font-weight:700;
        text-transform:uppercase;
    line-height:48px;
    margin-bottom: 30px;
    color: #fff;
}

.himex-content p {
    font-size: 16px;
    line-height: 1.6;
    margin-bottom:30px;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,.9);
}

.himex-list {
    list-style: none;
    padding: 0;
}

.himex-list li {
    position: relative;
    padding-left: 30px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    font-size: 15px;
    color: #fff;
}

.himex-list li:before {
    content: "";
    width: 10px;
    height: 10px;
    background: #2ecc71;
    border-radius: 50%;
    position: absolute;
    left: 0;
    top: 12px;
}

    padding:50px;
    border-radius:16px;

}

.himex-form-card h3{
    text-align:center;
    font-size:36px;
        font-weight:700;
        text-transform:uppercase;
        line-height:48px;
    margin-bottom:25px;
    color:#0d2d5c;
}

.himex-form-card .subtitle{
    text-align:center;
    color:#7b8794;
    margin-bottom:35px;
}

.himex-form-card label{

    margin-bottom:10px;
    font-weight:600;
    color:#5b6470;
}

.himex-form-card input[type=email]{
    width:100%;
    height:64px;
    border:1px solid #d7dde5;
    border-radius:8px;
    padding:0 20px;
    margin-bottom:20px;
}

.checkbox-row{

    align-items:flex-start;
    gap:10px;
    margin-bottom:25px;
}

.checkbox-row input{

}

=========================== */

.himex-journal-section{
    padding:120px 40px;
    background:#f8f6f2;
}

.himex-journal-header{
    text-align:center;
    max-width:800px;
    margin:0 auto 70px;
}

.himex-journal-pill{
    display:inline-block;
    padding:10px 24px;
    border-radius:50px;
    background:#edf2eb;
    color:#0b3d2e;
    font-size:18px;
    font-weight:400;
        line-height:27px;
    letter-spacing:1px;
    text-transform:uppercase;
}

.himex-journal-header h3{
    margin:25px 0;
    font-size:36px;
    font-weight:700;
    line-height:47px;
    text-transform:uppercase;
    color:#0f2f61;
}

.himex-journal-header p{
    font-size:18px;
        font-weight:400;
    color:#666;
    line-height:27px;
}

.himex-journal-grid{
    max-width:1140px;
    margin:auto;
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:1.7fr 1fr;
    gap:30px;
}

.himex-side{
    display:grid;
    gap:30px;
}

.himex-card{
    position:relative;
    overflow:hidden;
    border-radius:18px;
    min-height:320px;
}

.featured{
    min-height:700px;
}

.himex-card img{
    width:100%;
    height:100%;
    object-fit:cover;
    position:absolute;
    inset:0;
    transition:transform .8s ease;
}

.himex-card:hover img{
    transform:scale(1.08);
}

.himex-overlay{
    position:absolute;
    inset:0;
    background:linear-gradient(
        to top,
        rgba(6,20,40,.92),
        rgba(6,20,40,.15)
    );
}

.himex-journal-content{
    position:absolute;
    bottom:40px;
    left:40px;
    right:40px;
    z-index:2;
}

.himex-category{
    display:inline-block;
    padding:8px 18px;
    background:#1d8f57;
    color:#fff;
    border-radius:30px;
    font-size:12px;
    font-weight:700;
    letter-spacing:1px;
    margin-bottom:20px;
}

.himex-journal-content h3{
    color:#fff;
    font-size:24px;
    line-height:1.2;
    margin-bottom:20px;
}

.himex-card:not(.featured) h3{
    font-size:24px;
}

.himex-journal-content p{
        color:rgba(255,255,255,.85);
    margin-bottom:25px;
    line-height:24px; 
        font-size:15px; 
        font-weight:400;
}

.himex-journal-content a{
    color:#4ade80;
    font-weight:700;
    text-decoration:none;
}

.himex-journal-footer{
    text-align:center;
    margin-top:60px;
}

.himex-journal-btn{
    display:inline-block;
    background:#01cb68;
    color:#fff;
    padding:18px 40px;
    border-radius:8px;
    text-decoration:none;
    text-transform:uppercase;
        font-weight:700;
    transition:.3s;
}

.himex-journal-btn:hover{
    transform:translateY(-4px);
}

/* ===========================
   LARGE DESKTOPS
=========================== */

@media (min-width:1800px){

    .himex-journal-grid{
        max-width:1700px;
    }

    .featured{
        min-height:850px;
    }

    .himex-journal-content h3{
        font-size:42px;
    }
}

@media (max-width:1200px){

    .himex-journal-section{

    }

        min-height:600px;
    }

    .himex-journal-content{
        left:30px;
        right:30px;
        bottom:30px;
    }

    .himex-journal-content h3{
        font-size:32px;
    }
}

/* ========================
   TABLETS
=========================== */

@media (max-width:991px){

    .himex-journal-section{
        padding:90px 25px;
    }

    .himex-journal-grid{
        grid-template-columns:1fr;
    }

    .featured{
        min-height:550px;
    }

    .himex-journal-header{
        margin-bottom:50px;
    }

    .himex-journal-header h3{
        font-size:34px;
    }

    .himex-journal-header p{
        font-size:18px;
    }

    .himex-journal-content h3{
        font-size:30px;
    }

    .himex-card:not(.featured) h3{
        font-size:24px;
    }
}

/* =========================
   MOBILE DEVICES
=========================== */

@media (max-width:767px){

    .himex-journal-section{
        padding:70px 20px;
    }

    .himex-journal-header{
        margin-bottom:40px;
    }

    .himex-journal-header h3{
        font-size:28px;
        line-height:1.2;
    }

    .himex-journal-header p{
        font-size:16px;
        line-height:1.7;
    }

    .featured{
        min-height:420px;
    }

    .himex-card{
        min-height:300px;
        border-radius:14px;
    }

    .himex-journal-content{
        left:22px;
        right:22px;
        bottom:22px;
    }

    .himex-journal-content h3{
        font-size:24px;
        margin-bottom:15px;
    }

    .himex-card:not(.featured) h3{
        font-size:22px;
    }

    .himex-journal-content p{
        font-size:14px;
        line-height:1.6;
        margin-bottom:18px;
    }

    .himex-category{
        font-size:11px;
        padding:7px 14px;
        margin-bottom:14px;
    }

    .himex-journal-btn{
        width:100%;
        max-width:320px;
        text-align:center;
        padding:16px 25px;
    }
}

/* =======================
   SMALL MOBILE
========================== */

@media (max-width:480px){

    .himex-journal-section{
        padding:60px 15px;
    }

    .featured{
        min-height:360px;
    }

    .himex-card{
        min-height:260px;
    }

    .himex-journal-content{
        left:18px;
        right:18px;
        bottom:18px;
    }

    .himex-journal-content h3{
        font-size:20px;
    }

    .himex-card:not(.featured) h3{
        font-size:18px;
    }

    .himex-journal-content p{
        display:none;
    }

    .himex-journal-header h3{
        font-size:24px;
    }

    .himex-journal-header p{
        font-size:15px;
    }
}

class="justify-text wp-block-paragraph">At Himalayan Exploration Treks, our team is committed to assisting individuals in discovering Nepal’s breathtaking natural landscapes and diverse cultural heritage. We possess a deep passion for travel and an earnest desire to deliver unforgettable experiences to all our clients. We aim to provide easy access to the wonders of Nepal and ensure everyone can enjoy them to the fullest.</p> <hr class="wp-block-separator has-alpha-channel-opacity"> <div class="wp-block-columns is-layout-flex wp-container-core-columns-is-layout-8f761849 wp-block-columns-is-layout-flex"> <div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow" style="flex-basis:33.33%" nitro-exclude=""> <h2 class="wp-block-heading" id="h-our-story">OUR STORY</h2> <figure class="wp-block-image size-full is-style-default"><img fetchpriority="high" width="900" height="1200" alt="Founder of Himalayan Exploration" sizes="(max-width: 900px) 100vw, 900px" decoding="async" class="wp-image-19105" srcset="https://cdn-bommi.nitrocdn.com/CqOXhSMbacArileGjRFOlUFeuZgrPTei/assets/images/optimized/rev-2a6e7a7/www.himalayanexploration.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/founder-of-Himalayan-Exploration-2.jpg 900w, https://cdn-bommi.nitrocdn.com/CqOXhSMbacArileGjRFOlUFeuZgrPTei/assets/images/optimized/rev-2a6e7a7/www.himalayanexploration.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/founder-of-Himalayan-Exploration-2-600x800.jpg 600w, 225w, class="wp-element-caption">Founder</figcaption></figure> <hr class="wp-block-separator has-alpha-channel-opacity"> <h2 class="wp-block-heading" id="h-meet-the-team">MEET THE TEAM</h2> <p class="justify-text wp-block-paragraph">At Himalayan Exploration Treks, <a href="https://www.himalayanexploration.com/company/travel-specialist-team/" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener">our team</a> comprises a group of experts in tourism and destinations, travel consultants, knowledgeable local guides, and innovative content creators. They possess a deep understanding of the local culture and history.</p> <h2 class="wp-block-heading" id="h-why-travel-with-us">WHY TRAVEL WITH US?</h2> <p class="justify-text wp-block-paragraph">With so many travel companies offering similar trips and claiming top-notch services, how do you know which one to choose? Please give us a few convincing reasons <a href="https://www.himalayanexploration.com/company/why-with-us/" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener">why Himalayan Exploration Treks</a> should be your top pick.</p> </div> <div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow" style="flex-basis:66.66%" nitro-exclude=""> <p class="justify-text wp-block-paragraph">I am from the hill district of Kabhre Palanchok, a half-day road trip from the capital city, Kathmandu, in central Nepal, where I have my ancestral home and my parents still take care of the home and farm we own. Once I completed my secondary education there at a neighboring village school, like many other youths, I came to Kathmandu for further education.</p> <p class="justify-text wp-block-paragraph">As my parents couldn’t afford all the education expenses, I had to look for options for supporting my education. Amidst the challenging situations on my own, Nepal was going through a series of political incidents that included Maoist-waged armed struggle or people’s war and the country turning from king’s rule to multi-party democracy and eventually to a republic state. </p> <p class="justify-text wp-block-paragraph">I was compelled to abandon my ongoing education and went to Malaysia to find a job there as a foreign laborer. Even these days, hundreds of youths go abroad seeking a better future in Nepal, but only some get the jobs and luck they seek. </p> <p class="justify-text wp-block-paragraph">In Malaysia, I saw hundreds of fellow citizens experiencing challenging situations of low pay, extremely physically demanding jobs, and various other issues related to hard-working labor. There, I was involved in rescuing fellow workers who needed to return home but faced challenges of rules and situations they were abiding by, and some of them were in poor health conditions. </p> <p class="justify-text wp-block-paragraph">After spending six years there and experiencing more challenging situations, I returned to my homeland in 2008. As a member of the Tamang family, one of the indigenous hill groups of Nepal, born to work in the mountains, including trekking and climbing, with the help of my neighbors and friends, I decided to explore my chance in mountain tourism. </p> <p class="justify-text wp-block-paragraph">I started my career as a trekking porter, kitchen assistant, porter, and assistant guide for various trekking agencies in Kathmandu. I gathered adequate experience and confidence to start my agency. As a result, in 2013, I registered my own agency named Himalayan Exploration Treks. </p> <p class="justify-text wp-block-paragraph">Since then, I have been continuously working in the mountain tourism of Nepal. It has become a source of living for my small family of four and some support to my parents. At the same time, I get chances to see my country’s remote places and realize how beautiful it is. </p> <p class="justify-text wp-block-paragraph">I work with a small team of guides for trekking, climbing, and cultural tours. My group formed with members who love their country, not only for loving their motherland. But they try to make it different by working here in their homes, villages, and mountains. </p> <p class="justify-text wp-block-paragraph">Your trip with my team means a lot to us.
